user.title: MBTA
user.description: Enter your MBTA V3 API key. It is optional but strongly recommended — without one you share a low, unauthenticated rate limit. Get a free key at {signup_url}.

route_type.title: Choose a transit mode
route_type.description: Pick the type of service, then a route, then the stops you care about.

stops.title: Choose stops
stops.description: Select one or more stops on this route to track.

reconfigure_menu.title: Reconfigure MBTA
reconfigure_menu.description: Currently tracking {count} stop(s). Choose what to change, then Save.

edit_stops.title: Tracked stops
edit_stops.description: Leave a stop checked to keep tracking it; uncheck to remove it.

error.invalid_auth: The MBTA API rejected that API key.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the MBTA API. Check your connection and try again.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the MBTA API.
abort.no_routes: No routes were found for that transit mode.
abort.no_stops: No stops were found for that route.
